name: ensure_services
description: Check, start, or reset common services (PostgreSQL, Redis, MySQL, MongoDB, Elasticsearch) if not already running.

parameters.name: services
parameters.description: One or more service names (postgresql, redis, mysql, mongodb, elasticsearch); checks all if omitted

parameters.name: --reset
parameters.description: Force-kill, clean shared memory/lock files, then restart service

parameters.name: --reinit
parameters.description: Re-initialize PostgreSQL data directory with initdb (for corrupted data dirs); implies --reset

parameters.name: --check-logs
parameters.description: After starting PostgreSQL, if still not running, show last 30 log lines and process status

examples.expected: Kills postgres, cleans data dir, re-initializes with initdb, then starts

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses multi-step service startup checks into one step; --reset eliminates 4+ sequential kill/ipcrm/rm/pg_resetwal calls per stuck service; --reinit replaces 3+ step rm+initdb+pg_ctl sequences for corrupted data dirs; --check-logs replaces separate tail+ps diagnostic steps, saving 2+ steps per failure.
